Excel Intelligence Platform · v2.0

Your Excel.
Supercharged
by Real Data.

mbiX syncs Google Sheets data into a local SQLite database through a full ETL pipeline — giving your Excel workbooks live, validated, schema-driven data.

Download mbiX Interactive Demo →
